_comment: Synthetic example - high risk (Annex III-2 critical infrastructure) with a Critical AI-security profile. Showcases the architecture-aware severity, the STRIDE threat model, the red-team test plan and the defensive control catalogue.
sys_description: An LLM-based agent that monitors electricity-grid telemetry, diagnoses anomalies and can autonomously execute remediation actions (rerouting load, restarting controllers) through backend APIs, under on-call engineer oversight.
intended_purpose: Assist and partly automate the safe operation of a regional electricity distribution grid.
data_sources: Synthetic SCADA telemetry and internal operational runbooks.
human_oversight: An on-call engineer monitors the agent's actions and can halt it; high-impact actions require explicit confirmation.
